mechanism: First PC explaining >65% of credit variance means diversification across credit sub-sectors is illusory. During stress, crowded positions unwind simultaneously, amplifying the normal-to-crisis correlation regime transition from 0.3-0.4 to 0.7-0.9.
regime_dependence: Crowding builds during benign conditions with compressed dispersion. Correlation spike occurs during unwind when all crowded positions de-risk simultaneously.
